# Academic Project Page Template

This site is a reusable academic project page template. You can update the sample title, authors, abstract, figures, video settings, and BibTeX before publishing it for a real paper.

Keywords: academic project page, paper website template, research project page, static academic template, optional video section, image slider

Resources:
- Main page: /
- JSON config: /content/site.json
- Sections: /content/sections/
- Media: /content/media/
- BibTeX: /content/paper.bib
